existing_rule_rows_preservation_reason: source report is a pair-filtered bid/ask replay refresh; preserved existing rule rows for pairs outside source_pair_filter or broader same-pair rule rows when the focused refresh was narrower

price_truth_coverage.reason: All loaded forecast samples have local bid/ask candle truth for this replay window.

truth_source: local OANDA S5 bid/ask candles; UP entry=ask/exit=bid, DOWN entry=bid/exit=ask; same-candle TP+SL ambiguity counts as stop-first loss
